natural_strengths: Winning without direct confrontation through superior positioning
Choosing battlegrounds where your strengths matter most
Strategic patience — waiting for perfect conditions before acting
Deception and misdirection that keeps competitors off-balance
natural_weaknesses: Overemphasis on indirect approaches may miss opportunities for decisive action
Deception-centered strategy can undermine trust with allies
Strategic patience can become strategic paralysis
Formlessness may prevent building the organizational identity that motivates teams
communication_style: Spare, precise, and aphoristic. Says little but every word carries weight. Reveals strategic thinking selectively. Asks probing questions rather than giving direct answers.
one_liner: The supreme art of war is to subdue the enemy without fighting.
